name: squad-build
description: Reference implementation and documentation for building AMESA agents and simulators using the AMESA SDK.

publishing-docs.description: Interface reference for publishable AMESA components — skill teachers, controllers, coordinated skills, perceptors, and goals.

files.teacher.md: SkillTeacher — required and optional methods, hyperparameter kwargs, job JSON schema, pyproject.toml upload spec, quirks
files.controller.md: SkillController — required and optional methods, add_scenario, job JSON schema, pyproject.toml upload spec, quirks
files.coordinated.md: SkillCoach / SkillCoordinatedSet / SkillCoordinatedPopulation — required and optional methods, add_skill, job JSON schema, pyproject.toml upload spec, quirks
files.perceptors.md: PerceptorImpl / Perceptor — compute, filtered_sensor_space, constructor, job JSON schema, pyproject.toml upload spec, quirks
files.goals.md: Goal system — all goal types, constructor parameters, reward formulas, CoordinatedGoal, GoalCoordinationStrategy, helper methods, job JSON schema, quirks

root_files.manifest.json: This file — repo structure and file descriptions
